title: 闭环公开发布与匿名安装验证

sources.reason: Public distribution and installer regression coverage.
Published release contract and supply-chain references.

riskAssessment.reason: Public release claims must be verified against the actual anonymous network path.

executionDecision.reason: Public repository access is restored and the real release check passes.

preReviewWarnings: Keep the verification genuinely anonymous and do not substitute local source fixtures for the public path.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Anonymous public release verification passes for the declared tag and installer.
Fresh installation, upgrade, adoption, archive integrity, release metadata, SBOM, provenance, lock, and script checks agree.
Regression tests cover public distribution behavior and fail closed on release evidence drift.
The Work Item is fully verified, archived, and committed without pushing.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The release gate must prove that the public tag and anonymous installation path are real and consistent, not merely validate local fixtures.
constraints: Use the public repository and tag for the real check.
Do not weaken fail-closed release evidence validation.
intent.rationale: A real anonymous check closes the gap between repository-local tests and the artifact users can actually obtain.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Anonymous public tag discovery and installer fetch succeed.
Fresh installation, adoption, and upgrade behavior pass against the public release contract.
Release metadata and supply-chain drift fail closed before network installation.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
